title: Duʿāʾ Kumayl

lines.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ الَّتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
lines.transliteration: Allahumma inni as'aluka bi-rahmatika allati wasi'at kulla shay'.
lines.english: O Allah, I ask You by Your mercy which embraces all things.

lines.arabic: مُمَثِّل لِهَيْكَلِ بِنْيَةِ دُعَاءِ كُمَيْل لِلْعَرْضِ الْمَحَلِّي
lines.transliteration: Representative placeholder for the local Duʿāʾ Kumayl structure.
lines.english: Replace this line and the rest of the file with the exact source lines used by Al Zahraa Centre.

lines.arabic: يُرْجَى إِدْخَالُ كُلِّ مَقْطَعٍ بِنَصِّهِ الْعَرَبِيِّ وَالتَّرْجَمَةِ وَالتَّلْفِيظِ
